category_sources: Official QTads homepage says QTads is a cross-platform multimedia interpreter for TADS games.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is QTads - A Multimedia TADS Interpreter.
source_facts.homepage points to the QTads project site.
docs_sources: GitHub repository README is the official repository documentation surface.
Official QTads homepage provides about, downloads, license, related projects, and contact information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/realnc/qtads; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official QTads homepage says it interprets TADS games and supports multimedia TADS.
source_facts.description identifies it as a TADS multimedia interpreter.
